prompt: A long, narrow corridor stretches into the distance, its walls and ceiling showing signs of age and neglect. The floor is cracked and uneven, with patches of green moss growing through the fissures. Along both sides, rusted metal railings stand at intervals, their surfaces corroded and weathered. A blue suitcase rests against the wall on the right, partially obscured by the railing. The walls are painted a faded white, with large sections peeling away to reveal the underlying material. Above, fluorescent lights hang from the ceiling, casting a dim, cool glow that illuminates the scene. At the far end of the corridor, a red sign with the word "EXIT" glows faintly, serving as a focal point. The overall atmosphere is one of quiet abandonment and decay, with the corridor appearing to be part of an old, possibly institutional building. The camera moves forward, gradually revealing more of the corridor's length and the details of its deterioration.
